name: Faith Studio
next_task: Formalize tradition profiles, reverence guardrails, and source/tradition/interpretation labeling before any implementation starts.
current_focus: Concept captured from conversation history: sacred-content creation with tradition-aware interpretation, private witness mode, and stricter public publishing controls.
completion_checks: Source vs tradition vs interpretation are distinct and visible
Private witness mode is defined separately from public sacred publishing
Tradition-specific rendering is explicit rather than hidden in prompts
anti_drift_notes: Do not treat sacred content like ordinary entertainment prompts. Public sacred publishing requires stricter controls than private devotional viewing.
